mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.disputes_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, order_id, order_number, customer_id, customer_name, customer_email, seller_id, seller_name, dispute_type, reason, disputed_amount, priority, assigned_to, customer_complaint, seller_response, evidence_links, investigator_id, investigation_notes, resolution_outcome, resolution_notes, resolution_date, refund_amount, sla_target_days, state_id, flow_id, created_time ) SELECT d.id, d.tenant, NOW(), d.order_id, COALESCE(o.order_number, ''), d.customer_id, COALESCE(u.first_name || ' ' || COALESCE(u.last_name, ''), ''), COALESCE(u.email, ''), d.seller_id, COALESCE(s.business_name, ''), d.dispute_type, d.reason, COALESCE(d.disputed_amount, 0), d.priority, d.assigned_to, d.customer_complaint, d.seller_response, d.evidence_links, d.investigator_id, d.investigation_notes, d.resolution_outcome, d.resolution_notes, d.resolution_date, COALESCE(d.refund_amount, 0), COALESCE(d.sla_target_days, 5), d.state_id, d.flow_id, d.created_time FROM hm_disputes.dispute d LEFT JOIN hm_order.orders o ON d.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN hm_user.user_profiles u ON d.customer_id = u.id LEFT JOIN hm_supplier.supplier s ON d.seller_id = s.id
